REMITTITUR FILED THIS COURT DETERMINES THAT APPELLANT'S CONTENTIONS FAIL TO DEMONSTRATE PREJUDICIAL ERROR. THEREFORE IT IS ORDERED THAT THE JUDGMENT MADE AND ENTERED IN THE MUNICIPAL COURT IS HEREBY AFFIRMED. PURSUANT TO CCP SECTION 1034 AND CRC 135 A,B & C, COSTS ARE HEREBY AWARDED TO THE PREVAILING PARTY.
